verses.latin_vulgate: Alleluja.   Laudate Dominum, omnes gentes ;  laudate eum, omnes populi.
verses.king_james: O praise the Lord, all ye nations: praise him, all ye people.

verses.latin_vulgate: Quoniam confirmata est super nos misericordia ejus,  et veritas Domini manet in æternum.
verses.hebrew_masoretic: כִּ֥י־גָ֘בַ֤ר עָלֵ֨ינוּ ׀ חַסְדּ֗וֹ וֶאֱמֶת־יְהֹוָ֥ה לְעוֹלָ֗ם הַֽלְלוּ־יָֽהּ׃ {פ}
verses.king_james: For his merciful kindness is great toward us: and the truth of the Lord endureth for ever. Praise ye the Lord.
